info.title: FilePrepper CLI
info.description: A powerful .NET CLI tool for CSV/tabular data processing. Process data files without coding - normalize, transform, analyze, and convert formats.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: FilePrepper - ML Data Preprocessing Tool (CSV, TSV, JSON, XML, Excel)

options.name: --help

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress non-error output [default: False]

options.name: -v
options.description: Show detailed version information [default: False]

options.name: --output-column
options.description: Name of the new column to create

options.name: --conditions
options.description: Condition-value pairs (format: 'Column operator Value : ResultValue'). Example: 'Price > 100 : High'. Multiple conditions evaluated in order (first match wins).

options.name: --else
options.description: Default value if no conditions match (else value) [default: ]

commands.name: merge
commands.description: Merge multiple files vertically (concatenate) or horizontally (join)

options.name: --has-header
options.description: Whether input files have headers [default: True]

options.name: --ignore-errors
options.description: Whether to ignore errors during processing [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output [default: False]

options.name: --encoding
options.description: File encoding (auto, utf-8, cp949, euc-kr) [default: auto]

options.name: --skip-rows
options.description: Number of rows to skip before header [default: 0]

options.name: --input
options.description: Input file paths (space-separated)

options.name: --input-pattern
options.description: Glob pattern for input files (e.g., 'data/*.csv')

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path

options.name: --type
options.description: Merge type: Vertical (concatenate rows) or Horizontal (join columns)

options.name: --join-type
options.description: Join type for horizontal merge: Inner, Left, Right, Full [default: Inner]

options.name: --key-columns
options.description: Key columns for horizontal merge (comma-separated)

options.name: --join-mappings
options.description: Join column mappings for heterogeneous column names (format: 'left:right' or 'left:right:output', space-separated)

commands.name: merge-asof
commands.description: Merge two files based on nearest time matching (merge_asof)

options.name: --has-header
options.description: Whether input files have headers [default: True]

options.name: --ignore-errors
options.description: Whether to ignore errors during processing [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output [default: False]

options.name: --encoding
options.description: File encoding (auto, utf-8, cp949, euc-kr) [default: auto]

options.name: --skip-rows
options.description: Number of rows to skip before header [default: 0]

options.name: --input
options.description: Exactly 2 input file paths (left and right files, space-separated)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path

options.name: --left-on
options.description: Column name in left file to use for matching (typically datetime)

options.name: --right-on
options.description: Column name in right file to use for matching (typically datetime)

options.name: --direction
options.description: Matching direction: Backward (most recent <=), Forward (nearest >=), or Nearest (closest) [default: Backward]

options.name: --tolerance
options.description: Maximum time difference allowed for matching (in seconds). If not specified, no tolerance limit is applied.

options.name: --suffix
options.description: Suffix to add to right file columns to avoid name conflicts [default: _right]

commands.name: string
commands.description: String operations (substring, concat, replace, trim, upper, lower)

options.name: --output-column

options.name: --columns

options.name: --separator
options.description: Separator for concat [default: ]

options.name: --old-value
options.description: Value to replace

options.name: --new-value
options.description: Replacement value

options.name: --trim-mode
options.description: Trim mode: both, start, end [default: both]

commands.name: window
commands.description: Apply window operations (resample or rolling aggregations)

options.name: --has-header
options.description: Whether input files have headers [default: True]

options.name: --ignore-errors
options.description: Whether to ignore errors during processing [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output [default: False]

options.name: --encoding
options.description: File encoding (auto, utf-8, cp949, euc-kr) [default: auto]

options.name: --skip-rows
options.description: Number of rows to skip before header [default: 0]

options.name: --input
options.description: Input file path

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path

options.name: --type
options.description: Window type: resample (time-based) or rolling (row-based)

options.name: --method
options.description: Aggregation method: mean, min, max, sum, count, std [default: mean]

options.name: --columns
options.description: Target columns to aggregate (comma-separated)

options.name: --time-column
options.description: Time column for resample (required for resample type)

options.name: --window
options.description: Window size for resample: e.g., '5T' (5 minutes), '1H' (1 hour), '1D' (1 day)

options.name: --window-size
options.description: Window size in rows for rolling aggregation [default: 3]

options.name: --suffix
options.description: Suffix for rolling aggregation output columns [default: _rolling]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output [default: False]

options.name: --encoding
options.description: File encoding (auto, utf-8, cp949, euc-kr) [default: auto]

options.name: --skip-rows
options.description: Number of rows to skip before header [default: 0]

options.name: --input
options.description: Input file path

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path

options.name: --columns
options.description: Columns to normalize

options.name: --method
options.description: Normalization method (MinMax/ZScore)

options.name: --min
options.description: Min value for MinMax scaling [default: 0]

options.name: --max
options.description: Max value for MinMax scaling [default: 1]

commands.name: scale
commands.description: Scale numeric columns using specified methods

options.name: --has-header
options.description: Whether input files have headers [default: True]

options.name: --ignore-errors
options.description: Whether to ignore errors during processing [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output [default: False]

options.name: --encoding
options.description: File encoding (auto, utf-8, cp949, euc-kr) [default: auto]

options.name: --skip-rows
options.description: Number of rows to skip before header [default: 0]

options.name: --input
options.description: Input file path

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path

options.name: --scaling
options.description: Scaling methods in format column:method (e.g. Price:MinMax,Score:Standardization)

commands.name: data-sampling
commands.description: Sample data from the input file

options.name: --has-header
options.description: Whether input files have headers [default: True]

options.name: --ignore-errors
options.description: Whether to ignore errors during processing [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output [default: False]

options.name: --encoding
options.description: File encoding (auto, utf-8, cp949, euc-kr) [default: auto]

options.name: --skip-rows
options.description: Number of rows to skip before header [default: 0]

options.name: --input
options.description: Input file path

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path

options.name: --method
options.description: Sampling method (Random/Systematic/Stratified)

options.name: --size
options.description: Sample size (ratio 0-1 or absolute count)

options.name: --seed
options.description: Random seed for reproducibility

options.name: --stratify
options.description: Column for stratified sampling

options.name: --interval
options.description: Interval for systematic sampling
